name: Curated News
description: Our hand-picked set of news sources worth shuffling through.

name: Drudge Report
description: The internet's original news aggregator, known for its minimalist design, influential link selection, and focus on breaking news.

name: Skimfeed · News
description: Skimfeed's general news feed, surfacing trending headlines from a wide range of online publications.

name: Skimfeed · Tech
description: Skimfeed's technology topic page, featuring links from major tech publications and blogs.

name: Skimfeed · Politics
description: Skimfeed's politics topic page, aggregating political news and commentary.

name: Skimfeed · Science
description: Skimfeed's science topic page, linking to science and research publications.

name: Skimfeed · Aggregators
description: Skimfeed's aggregator page, listing other news aggregators and link collections.

name: RealClearPolitics
description: A political news and polling hub featuring reporting, commentary, and analysis from across the ideological spectrum.

name: Techmeme
description: A leading technology news aggregator that tracks the stories, companies, and conversations shaping the tech industry.

name: Memeorandum
description: A political news aggregator that organizes coverage from major publications, independent outlets, and influential commentators.

name: Mediagazer
description: A media industry news aggregator covering journalism, publishing, streaming, advertising, and the business of media.

name: Brutalist · News
description: The Brutalist Report's general news feed — plaintext links from across the web.
